top_signals.title: US and Iran Agree to Halt Attacks Ahead of Talks
top_signals.summary:
The US and Iran have agreed to stop attacking each other before peace talks resume this week over the Strait of Hormuz and other issues.

It follows days of tit-for-tat attacks that risk slowing progress toward restoring traffic through the vital waterway. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Wall Street Is Abandoning Bets on a Stronger Euro
top_signals.summary: Wall Street banks are capitulating on bets for a stronger euro, as markets see the US outpacing Europe on interest-rate hikes for the rest of this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: India’s USDT premium tops 8.5% as crypto remittance crackdown squeezes stablecoin supply: report
top_signals.summary: India's USDT premium topped 8.5% after Enforcement Directorate raids on Bengaluru crypto firms reportedly disrupted stablecoin supply.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
